title: Proof of Life — canary → scores → routing feedback loop

checks.description: PR #606 merged to main on OmniNode-ai/omnimarket with verified commit SHA
Integration test exercises full canary → scores → routing chain without database
checks.command: gh pr diff 606 -R OmniNode-ai/omnimarket | grep -E 'proof_of_life|feedback_loop|canary.*routing' | head -3
checks.output:
diff --git a/src/omnimarket/nodes/node_canary_score_reducer/tests/test_integration_feedback_loop.py b/src/omnimarket/nodes/node_canary_score_reducer/tests/test_integration_feedback_loop.py
+++ b/src/omnimarket/nodes/node_canary_score_reducer/tests/test_integration_feedback_loop.py
+"""End-to-end integration test: canary → scores → routing feedback loop.

checks.description: Test verifies Qwen3-Coder (0.94 recall) selected over DeepSeek-R1 (0.70 recall)
checks.command: gh pr diff 606 -R OmniNode-ai/omnimarket | grep -E 'Qwen3.Coder|qwen3.coder|0\.94' | head -3
checks.output:
+  5. HandlerRoutingPolicy.handle() -> selects champion (qwen3-coder-30b) ->

+                model_key="qwen3-coder-30b",

checks.description: routing_outcomes rows include quality_score > 0.0 verified in integration test
checks.command: gh pr diff 606 -R OmniNode-ai/omnimarket | grep 'quality_score' | head -3
